body_txt: A character wakes up violently, drawing weapons or leaping straight into combat stance in the process, and sometimes actually attacking a person who woke them up. In Real Life , this is usually a sign of severe violence-related PTSD , but in fiction it is often Played for Laughs or depicted as a credential of Badassness . Compare Ring-Ring-CRUNCH! , Instant Waking Skills . For a similar reaction from someone who is awake, but taken by surprise, see Don't Sneak Up on Me Like That! . If you're looking for the Fighting Game mechanic commonly referred to as a "wake up", see Recovery Attack .
